Accordeão

Accordeão

The accordion fits very well with different music styles. What about having this sound in your music? Here you can see some examples I have recorded for people around the world.

You can contact me directly through email raubachdavi@gmail.com (PayPal) or hire me on SoundBetter.


Equipment

Accordion: Titano (reeds: 3/4, registers: 5/2)

Microphones: AKG C214 and C3000
